pi_items.source: Explicitly required in task.json description and tested in export_result.sh (TARGET="Active Guidelines Search").
Explicitly required in task.json description and extracted in export_result.sh. (Note: verifier.py is missing to enforce this).
Explicitly required in task.json description and dynamically injected into behavioral tests in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: The expected tiddler title ('Active Guidelines Search'), tag ('Dashboard'), and state tiddler ('$:/state/guideline-search') exactly match the task description and are checked via export_result.sh. The clinical guidelines and noisy data are synthetically generated directly via setup_task.sh. However, it was discovered that the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
